abilities.description: Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to a random stat to an adjacent unit.Upgraded: Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to 2 random stats to any unit.

translation.ru_description: Дайте соседнему юниту +2 Угасающей Регенерации и +1 к случайной хар-ке.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте любому юниту +2 Угасающей Регенерации и +1 к 2 случайным хар-кам.
translation.en_description: Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to a random stat to an adjacent unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to 2 random stats to any unit.

abilities.description: Inflict Blind 1 on each unit in an area.Upgraded: Inflict Blind 2 on each unit in a larger area.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Слепоту 1 на всех в области.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Слепоту 2 на всех в большей области.
translation.en_description: Inflict Blind 1 on each unit in an area.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Blind 2 on each unit in a larger area.

abilities.description: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up, then you fall asleep.Upgraded: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up.

translation.ru_description: Воскресите тело с 100% ОЗ, дайте ему Повышение Всех Характеристик, затем вы засыпаете.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Воскресите тело с 100% ОЗ и дайте ему Повышение Всех Характеристик.
translation.en_description: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up, then you fall asleep.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up.

abilities.description: Give a unit +1 Damage. That unit becomes the Alpha. If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack.Upgraded: Give a unit +1 Damage and +1 Magic Damage. That unit becomes the Alpha. If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack. (This spell costs less.)

Дайте юниту +1 Урон. Он становится Альфой.
Если Альфа уже есть, заклинание бьет в него и дает +1 бонусную атаку.

Дайте юниту +1 Урон и +1 Маг. Урон. Он становится Альфой.
Если Альфа уже есть, заклинание бьет в него и дает +1 бонусную атаку.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]

Give a unit +1 Damage. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack.

If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Remove all debuffs from units in an area.Upgraded: Remove all debuffs from units in an area. Those units get +1 for each debuff removed.

translation.ru_description: Снимите все дебаффы с юнитов в области.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Снимите все дебаффы с юнитов в области. Эти юниты получают +1 [img:divineshield] за каждый снятый дебафф.
translation.en_description: Remove all debuffs from units in an area.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Remove all debuffs from units in an area. Those units get +1 [img:divineshield] for each debuff removed.

abilities.description: Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit.Upgraded: Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit. Non-boss enemies with less than 25% health join your party.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Очарование 2 на соседнего юнита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Очарование 2 на соседнего юнита. Обычные враги (не боссы) с <25% ОЗ переходят на вашу сторону.
translation.en_description: Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit. Non-boss enemies with less than 25% health join your party.

abilities.description: You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy.Upgraded: You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy and gain +1 Strength.

translation.ru_description: Вы и ваши союзники движетесь к ближайшему врагу.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Вы и ваши союзники движетесь к ближайшему врагу и получаете +1 [img:str].
translation.en_description: You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy.
translation.en_upgraded_description: You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy and gain +1 [img:str].

abilities.description: Gain All Stats Up. This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Gain All Stats Up and +1 . This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn. (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Получите Повышение Всех Характеристик. Стоит на 1 ману меньше за каждое ОЗ, которое вы восстановили другим в этот ход.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Получите Повышение Всех Характеристик и +1 [img:divineshield]. Стоит на 1 ману меньше за каждое ОЗ, которое вы восстановили другим в этот ход.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Gain All Stats Up. This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Gain All Stats Up and +1 [img:divineshield]. This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: Give a unit +1 and +1 Kinetic Spikes. That unit becomes the Alpha. If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.Upgraded: Give a unit anywhere +1 and +2 Kinetic Spikes. That unit becomes the Alpha. If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.

translation.ru_description:
Дайте юниту +1 [img:divineshield] и +1 Кинетические Шипы. Он становится Альфой.
Если Альфа уже есть, заклинание стоит дешевле и бьет только в него.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:

If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.

If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.

abilities.description: Give a unit +10 Speed until the end of its next turn.Upgraded: Give units in an area +10 Speed until the end of their next turns.

translation.ru_description: Дайте юниту +10 [img:spd] до конца его следующего хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте юнитам в области +10 [img:spd] до конца их следующих ходов.
translation.en_description: Give a unit +10 [img:spd] until the end of its next turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give units in an area +10 [img:spd] until the end of their next turns.

abilities.description: You or an adjacent unit gains +1 Health Regeneration.Upgraded: You or an adjacent unit gains +2 Health Regeneration.

translation.ru_description: Вы или сосед получаете +1 Регенерацию Здоровья.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Вы или сосед получаете +2 Регенерацию Здоровья.
translation.en_description: You or an adjacent unit gains +1 Health Regeneration.
translation.en_upgraded_description: You or an adjacent unit gains +2 Health Regeneration.

abilities.description: Inflict Ostracized 2 on a unit.Upgraded: Inflict Ostracized 4 on a unit.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Изгнание 2 на юнита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Изгнание 4 на юнита.
translation.en_description: Inflict Ostracized 2 on a unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Ostracized 4 on a unit.

abilities.description: Inflict Weakness on units in an area.Upgraded: Inflict Weakness and Poison on units in an area.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Слабость на юнитов в области.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Слабость и Яд на юнитов в области.
translation.en_description: Inflict Weakness on units in an area.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Weakness and Poison on units in an area.

abilities.description: Give another unit +5 Luck until the end of its next turn.Upgraded: Give allies +5 Luck and enemies -5 Luck until the end of their next turns, in an area.

translation.ru_description: Дайте другому юниту +5 [img:lck] до конца его следующего хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте союзникам +5 [img:lck], а врагам -5 [img:lck] до конца их следующих ходов (в области).
translation.en_description: Give another unit +5 [img:lck] until the end of its next turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give allies +5 [img:lck] and enemies -5 [img:lck] until the end of their next turns, in an area.

abilities.description: Force a unit to attack one of its enemies.Upgraded: Force units in an area to each attack one of their enemies.

translation.ru_description: Заставьте юнита атаковать одного из своих врагов.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Заставьте юнитов в области атаковать одного из своих врагов.
translation.en_description: Force a unit to attack one of its enemies.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Force units in an area to each attack one of their enemies.

abilities.description: Deal damage to a unit equal to the damage that unit last dealt.Upgraded: Deal damage to a unit equal to twice the damage that unit last dealt.

translation.ru_description: Нанесите юниту урон, равный урону, который он нанес последним.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Нанесите юниту урон, равный двойному урону, который он нанес последним.
translation.en_description: Deal damage to a unit equal to the damage that unit last dealt.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Deal damage to a unit equal to twice the damage that unit last dealt.

abilities.description: Reverse the last damage an adjacent unit took.Upgraded: Reverse the last damage a unit within range took.

translation.ru_description: Отмените последний урон, полученный соседним юнитом.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Отмените последний урон, полученный юнитом в радиусе досягаемости.
translation.en_description: Reverse the last damage an adjacent unit took.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Reverse the last damage a unit within range took.

abilities.description: Revive a body to 50% HP and cure one of its injuries.Upgraded: Revive a body to 100% HP and cure one of its injuries. If it was an enemy, it gets charmed.

translation.ru_description: Воскресите тело с 50% ОЗ и вылечите одну травму.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Воскресите тело с 100% ОЗ и вылечите одну травму. Если это был враг, он очаровывается.
translation.en_description: Revive a body to 50% HP and cure one of its injuries.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Revive a body to 100% HP and cure one of its injuries. If it was an enemy, it gets charmed.

abilities.description: You and adjacent units gain +2 Speed.Upgraded: You and adjacent units gain +2 Speed and +1 Intelligence.

translation.ru_description: Вы и соседи получаете +2 [img:spd].
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Вы и соседи получаете +2 [img:spd] и +1 [img:int].
translation.en_description: You and adjacent units gain +2 [img:spd].
translation.en_upgraded_description: You and adjacent units gain +2 [img:spd] and +1 [img:int].

abilities.description: Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha. If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.Upgraded: Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha. If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range, costs less and must target it, and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.

translation.ru_description:
Дайте юниту +1 Бонусное Движение. Он становится Альфой.
Если Альфа уже есть, заклинание бьет в него и дает вам +1 Бонусное Движение тоже.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Дайте юниту +1 Бонусное Движение. Он становится Альфой.
Если Альфа уже есть, заклинание бьет через всю карту, стоит дешевле и дает вам +1 Бонусное Движение.
translation.en_description:
Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range, costs less and must target it, and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.

abilities.description: Force a nearby unit to move away from you.Upgraded: Force a nearby unit to move away from you. If it was an enemy, inflict Madness 1 and Confusion 1.

translation.ru_description: Заставьте ближайшего юнита убегать от вас.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Заставьте ближайшего юнита убегать. Если это враг, наложите Безумие 1 и Замешательство 1.
translation.en_description: Force a nearby unit to move away from you.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Force a nearby unit to move away from you. If it was an enemy, inflict Madness 1 and Confusion 1.

abilities.description: Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, its killer gains All Stats Up.Upgraded: Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, it becomes meat and its killer gains All Stats Up. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Назначьте награду за голову юнита. Когда он умрет, его убийца получит Повышение Всех Характеристик.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Назначьте награду за голову юнита. Когда он умрет, он станет мясом, а убийца получит Повышение Всех Характеристик.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, its killer gains All Stats Up.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, it becomes meat and its killer gains All Stats Up.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, its killer gains All Stats Up.Upgraded: Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, it becomes meat and its killer gains All Stats Up. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Назначьте награду за голову юнита. Когда он умрет, его убийца получит Повышение Всех Характеристик.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Назначьте награду за голову юнита. Когда он умрет, он станет мясом, а убийца получит Повышение Всех Характеристик.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, its killer gains All Stats Up.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, it becomes meat and its killer gains All Stats Up.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Gain +1 .Upgraded: Gain +1 . (This spell costs less.)
